name: Pasta with Red Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 36 small Fresh clams such as littleneck or Manila, in the shell, thoroughly cleansed
1 large Ripe tomato, peeled, cored, seeded and coarsely chopped
1 1/2 tablespoons Fresh basil leaves, finely shredded
1 1/2 tablespoons Fresh Italian parsley, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the oil with the garlic over moderate heat. When the garlic sizzles, add the fish stock, wine, and oregano.
2. As soon as the liquid comes to a boil, add the clams and cover the pan.
3. Steam the clams until all of them have opened, 3 to 5 minutes; discard any unopened clams. With a slotted spoon, remove them from the pan and keep them warm in a covered bowl.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except the black pepper) into the liquid in the pan. As soon as the liquid returns to a simmer, place the clams, shells and all, on top of pasta and spoon the liquid over them.
5. Season to taste with black pepper.
